home.situation: Systems Engineering Student and Software Developer
home.description: from Cochabamba, Bolivia. Specialized in web application development.

about.title: About Me
about.content: As a fullstack developer, I combine my ability to code both frontend and backend, along with a solid understanding of user needs. I am always looking for challenges that allow me to create innovative and exciting products, while improving my skills in the process.

experienceList.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
experienceList.company: DTIC - Department of Information and Communication Technologies UMSS, Cochabamba
text: Contributed to a team developing a web application for monitoring and managing the Mercosur university accreditation system
Assisted in requirement analysis, documentation, data modeling, and development

projectsList.title: Onelink - Based on LinkTree
projectsList.description: Development in React, Express, MongoDB, NodeJs, Typescript
text: Developed as a personal project a web application based on LinkTree to share social media links and websites
Implemented a backend in NodeJs with Express, Typescript, and MongoDB to store links and user settings
Developed a frontend in React with Typescript, Tailwind, Shadcn, Zod, React Hook Forms, and TanstackQuery for the user interface
Used JWT authentication and password encryption for application security
Implemented Docker and docker-compose for application deployment

projectsList.title: Black Jack 21
projectsList.description: Guided development with Fernando Herrera's Modern JavaScript Course
text: Developed a Black Jack 21 web application using modern JavaScript technologies
Implemented game logic, algorithms for the computer player, CSS for card deck and board styles
Utilized modern JavaScript practices adhering to ES6 standards.

projectsList.title: Basketball Tournament Management System
projectsList.description: Full Stack Developer for Software Engineering Course at University
text: Designed and developed a comprehensive sports tournament management system
Involved in analysis, development, and utilized Django framework and PostgreSQL
Developed components such as standings table, tournament creation, landing page, team management, and team member credential creation

projectsList.title: Web Application for Physical and Mental Exercises for Older Adults
projectsList.description: Developer for Software Engineering Course at University
text: Conceptualized and developed a web application for tailored physical and mental exercises for older adults
Contributed to requirement analysis, system modeling, and development
Developed using Vanilla JavaScript connected with Firebase
Tasks included creating exercises, starting physical exercise routines, and tracking completed routines
